name: documents
description: Convert documents between formats. Accepts PDFs, Office files, and images. The `convert` command renders pages to PNG images. The `convert-to-markdown` command extracts text as Markdown. The `convert-markdown` command renders Markdown to Office/PDF outputs.

actions.name: convert
actions.description: Render a document to page-by-page PNG images. Office files are converted to PDF first, then each page becomes `page_001.png`, `page_002.png`, etc. Returns JSON with the list of image paths.

actions.name: convert-to-markdown
actions.description: Extract document content as Markdown text. Legacy Office formats (.doc, .ppt, .xls) are upgraded first for better extraction. Returns JSON with the output Markdown file path.

actions.name: convert-markdown
actions.description: Render Markdown to Office/PDF outputs. Defaults to DOCX and PDF. Use `--format` (repeatable) to specify formats like docx, pdf, pptx. Returns JSON with the generated file paths.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format (docx, pdf, pptx, etc.). Can be repeated for multiple outputs.

parameters.name: reference_doc
parameters.description: Template file for styling Office outputs (docx/pptx).

parameters.name: pdf_engine
parameters.description: PDF rendering engine (e.g., xelatex). Default engine works for most cases.

page_images.description: Numbered PNG pages from convert command.

notes: All commands return JSON to stdout with output file paths.
Use --output-dir to specify where files are written.
Check command exit code and JSON output for success/failure.
